effects.name: Tricera
effects.effect: Cannot be Charged. Super Evolves from Tricera. Your Opponent gets KO 2 Points if defeated. You can only play 1 Super Evolve Vivosaur card in your Deck.

effects.name: Champion's Heart
effects.effect: All [Ceratop] Vivosaurs' Attack Skills deal +30 base damage.

effects.name: Heracles Blade
effects.effect: Apply Enflame to a Vivosaur you control.

effects.name: Heracles Bore
effects.effect: Reduce the damage of this Attack Skill by 20 for each card in your Opponent's FP Zone.
